original_image_tags: Line graph titled "Delta-GEM". The y-axis is labeled "Breakup Percent (%)" ranging from 0 to 100 in increments of 10. The x-axis is labeled "Failure Time (sec)" ranging from 0 to 280 in increments of 40. A legend indicates three curves based on "q-alpha in deg-lb/ft²":

elements.description: Line graph titled 'Delta-GEM' showing breakup percentages versus failure time. Y-axis is 'Breakup Percent (%)' ranging from 0 to 100. X-axis is 'Failure Time (sec)' ranging from 0 to 280. Three lines are plotted: a solid line for 'q-alpha = 5,000', a dashed line for 'q-alpha = 10,000', and a dotted line for 'q-alpha = 20,000'. A legend specifies 'q-alpha in deg-lb/ft²'. The chart is captioned 'Figure 23. Delta-GEM Breakup Percentages'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the chart title, axis labels, ranges, number of curves, and legend content, with no contradictions on visual details.
